data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external directory links to internal users/subjects.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as offer creation and booking processes, without addressing the external directory links, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: External directory links to internal users/subjects validation evidence is missing.
